biology.title: Biology
biology.summary: Cells, genetics, biological systems and more.

quizzes.title: Mitosis
quizzes.description: Interphase and mitotic phases — identify events and microscope images.

quizzes.title: Meiosis
quizzes.description: Meiosis I and II — crossing over, segregation, and gamete formation.

quizzes.title: Mendelian Genetics
quizzes.description: Genotypes, phenotypes, dominance, and Punnett square reasoning.

quizzes.title: Chromosomal Basis of Inheritance
quizzes.description: Linked genes, sex linkage, recombination, and pedigree analysis.

quizzes.title: Molecular Basis of Inheritance
quizzes.description: DNA structure, replication enzymes, and repair mechanisms.

quizzes.title: Gene to Protein
quizzes.description: Transcription, RNA processing, translation, and mutations.

quizzes.title: Gene Regulation
quizzes.description: Operons, epigenetics, differentiation, and cell specialization.

quizzes.title: Animal Form and Function
quizzes.description: Homeostasis, thermoregulation, tissues, and organ systems overview.

quizzes.title: Animal Nutrition
quizzes.description: Digestive tracts, enzymes, and nutrient processing across animals.

quizzes.title: Circulation and Gas Exchange
quizzes.description: Cardiovascular anatomy, blood flow, and respiratory gas exchange.

quizzes.title: The Immune System
quizzes.description: Innate and adaptive immunity, antibodies, and immune responses.

quizzes.title: Osmoregulation and Excretion
quizzes.description: Kidney function, nephron segments, and water/solute balance.

quizzes.title: Hormones and the Endocrine System
quizzes.description: Endocrine glands, hormone signaling, and feedback loops.

quizzes.title: Neurons, Synapses, and Signaling
quizzes.description: Action potentials, synaptic transmission, and neural signaling.

quizzes.title: Nervous System
quizzes.description: CNS/PNS organization, brain regions, and autonomic control.

chemistry.title: Chemistry
chemistry.summary: Acids, bases, polyatomic ions and more.

quizzes.title: Acids and Bases
quizzes.description: Classify common acids and bases by strength.

quizzes.title: Polyatomic Ions
quizzes.description: Formulas and charges of common polyatomic ions.
